title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build agentic AI applications using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal, and VS Code integration. The example creates an AI Resume and Cover Letter Generator using Claude's API, Node.js, and FastAPI, covering installation, configuration, and local deployment workflows.
